ü A proverb is a short statement or saying that expresses a basic truth. The following are
the types of proverbs:

topics: Grey Hair (an extract from Quills of Desire Revision and Study Guides)

activities: Lead a class discussion and guide learners on how to compose praises.

Plenary session.
You may consider the following points:
ü Idioms are phrases or expressions whose meanings are not directly derived from the
literal meanings of the individual words they contain. They often have cultural or
contextual significance, making them unique to specific languages or regions.
